title: taraxacum telmatophilum
intro: Taraxacum telmatophilum, commonly known as the marsh dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum telmatophilum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including arthritis and digestive problems.
